title: Sanitize Equipment Removed for Off-Site Maintenance of CUI
description: ensure equipment removed for off-site maintenance is sanitized of any CUI

checks.name: Equipment Removed for Off-Site Maintenance is Sanitized of CUI
checks.purpose: Sanitization of equipment prior to off-site maintenance including data wiping, encryption verification, and removal of CUI from storage media is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Client

checks.name: Equipment Removed for Off-Site Maintenance is Sanitized of CUI
checks.purpose: Sanitization of equipment prior to off-site maintenance is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Server

checks.name: Equipment Removed for Off-Site Maintenance is Sanitized of CUI
checks.purpose: Sanitization of equipment prior to off-site maintenance is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Linux

checks.name: Equipment Removed for Off-Site Maintenance is Sanitized of CUI
checks.purpose: Sanitization of equipment prior to off-site maintenance is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Debian

remediation: Establish and document equipment sanitization procedures for off-site maintenance. Ensure all CUI is removed or encrypted prior to equipment leaving organizational spaces. Maintain sanitization records and verify equipment upon return from off-site maintenance.
